a:r.a:t: HGV’s end-to-end revenue flow reveals friction at key handoffs
Telemarketing confirms travel dates and reactivated package holders
Field marketing fills open tour slots
Incentives not aligned to quality attendance
Lead quality does not include CLV in lead gen process
On Property Marketing (Lobby / In-House) upsells tours & manages check-in qualifications
New hires struggle to get quality reps
Assigned tour schedule based on customer qualification
(most prospective leads sent to top reps)
Heavy reliance on TO’s to save deals
No-shows impact conversion and comp. potential
collects deposits, sets travel windows and captures qualification data
HGV Sales, Telemarketing & Marketing Process Flows
